description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs Rust tests across multiple versions with a global before_script that changes to the hardware-simulator directory and prints rustc, cargo and rustup versions. Define jobs named 1.26.0, 1.27.0 and 1.28.0 that use the rust:1.26.0, rust:1.27.0 and rust:1.28.0 images respectively and execute cargo test --all. Add a beta job using the rust:slim image with a before_script that cd's into hardware-simulator, sets rustup default to beta, prints versions, then runs cargo test --all. Add a clippy job using rust:slim that runs a before_script to cd hardware-simulator, set rustup default nightly, install the clippy-preview component, print versions, and then runs cargo clippy. Include a latest job on rust:slim that runs cargo test --all, and a nightly job marked allow_failure true on rust:slim with a before_script that cd's into hardware-simulator, sets rustup default nightly, prints versions, and runs cargo test --all. Cache the build artifacts using paths "*/target/" and "$HOME/.cargo/" and let all jobs run in the default test stage.
